content:
## extension.ts 完整代码结构分析（6118行）

### 文件路径
`/home/skyfire/code/Jarvis/src/jarvis/jarvis_vscode_extension/src/extension.ts`

### 核心类
1. **ChatPanelViewProvider** (第253-300行): WebviewViewProvider 实现，管理聊天面板 WebView 生命周期
2. **JarvisAgentListViewProvider** (第302-5777行): 核心类，管理 Agent 列表视图、连接、消息处理、文件树、终端等

### 关键接口 (第125-251行)
- ChatPanelState, CompletionItem, RemoteDirectoryItem, FileTreeNode, RemoteDirectoryBrowserState, CreateAgentFormState, AgentListViewMessage, SavedConnectionInfo, PersistedChatMessageItem

### 常量 (第243-251行)
- MAX_PERSISTED_MESSAGES_PER_AGENT=1000, MAX_PERSISTED_EXECUTION_BUFFER_LENGTH=50000
- AGENT_CONNECTION_MAX_RETRIES=12, AGENT_CONNECTION_RETRY_DELAY_MS=2000
- GATEWAY_RECONNECT_INTERVAL_MS=5000, AGENT_LIST_REFRESH_INTERVAL_MS=3000

### JarvisAgentListViewProvider 方法分布
- 消息处理 (440-606行): 30+ 消息类型
- HTML 生成 (621-1831行): getAgentListHtml, getLeftLoginHtml, getChatPanelHtml
- 聊天面板消息处理 (1834-1896行)
- 历史加载 (1898-1963行): loadMoreHistory
- 连接管理 (1965-2011行): disconnectAll
- 持久化 (2013-2150行): 连接信息/聊天历史
- Agent 刷新 (2221-2314行): refreshAgents
- 消息发送 (2316-2415行): sendAgentMessage, sendCompletionSignal, sendManualInterrupt
- 补全功能 (2417-2537行): openCompletions, searchCompletions
- 终端管理 (2539-2837行): 执行终端输入/调整大小、独立终端
- 文件树 (2839-3590行): initFileTree, loadFileTreeNode, toggleFileTreeNode, openRemoteFile, saveRemoteFile, 远端文件心跳检查, 只读/编辑模式切换
- 登录认证 (3592-3689行): loginWithPassword, fetchWithAuth, handleAuthExpired
- 模型组/节点 (3691-3752行): loadModelGroups, loadNodeOptions
- 重启服务 (3758-3838行): restartNodeService
- 连接锁 (3840-3851行): setConnectionLockEnabled
- 状态推送 (3853-3899行): postPanelState, postMessageToChatPanel
- 创建Agent表单 (3945-4230行): toggleCreateAgentForm, pickWorkingDirectory, loadRemoteDirectories
- 复制/删除Agent (4199-4293行): copyAgent, deleteAgent
- 批量操作 (4295-4481行): toggleBatchMode, batchCopyAgents, batchDeleteAgents
- 创建Agent (4483-4608行): createAgent
- WebSocket连接 (4654-4950行): connectGatewaySocket, connectAgentSocket (含重连逻辑)
- 消息处理 (4952-5210行): handleGatewaySocketMessage, handleAgentSocketMessage
- 确认请求 (5212-5273行): handleConfirmRequest, sendConfirmResult
- 输出处理 (5275-5401行): handleOutputPayload (STREAM_START/CHUNK/END/DIFF), handleExecutionPayload
- 执行终端会话 (5487-5620行): ensureExecutionTerminalSession, upsertExecutionMessage
- CodeAgent Diff (5663-5761行): showCodeAgentDiff
- dispose (5763-5777行)

### 辅助函数 (5861-6118行)
- parseGatewayAddress, isLocalAddress, isLocalMasterNode
- buildNodeHttpUrl, buildHttpUrl, buildWebSocketProtocols
- buildNodeWebSocketUrl, buildWebSocketUrl, buildAgentWebSocketUrl
- parseSocketMessage, decodeExecutionChunk, appendTerminalChunk
- getErrorMessage, escapeHtml, createNonce

### activate/deactivate (6024-6110行)
- 注册 WebviewViewProvider、命令、文件保存监听、编辑器切换监听
